required_decisions: Decide whether a separate architecture program should exist
stop_conditions: Any request to add real broker access to this repository
Any request to add credentials or login flows
forbidden_transitions: Research platform directly becomes an operational trading system
Paper outputs are treated as real account instructions
Dashboard actions are expanded into external actions
Broker connectivity is added without a separate program
safe_transition_sequence: Review legal, compliance, and risk boundaries
Decide go/no-go for architecture-only future work
first_safe_next_step: Complete documentation and metadata reconciliation, then decide whether to start a separate architecture program.
